description: Perform a multi-site conservation survey in South America using QField by creating 'Observation' points within the city limits of three capital cities. At Brasília, Brazil (approx -15.78, -47.93), set attributes to Observer='Rivera', Type='habitat_survey', and Notes='Cerrado biome assessment - dry season'. At Lima, Peru (approx -12.05, -77.04), set attributes to Observer='Rivera', Type='habitat_survey', and Notes='Coastal desert transition zone'. At Buenos Aires, Argentina (approx -34.60, -58.38), set attributes to Observer='Rivera', Type='habitat_survey', and Notes='Pampas grassland fringe monitoring'.
